name: Seediq
notes: STUB: the grapheme inventory of Seediq is NOT yet specified (graphemes/allophones are empty). Seediq (including the Truku/Taroko variety, which the ISO code trv names) is a Formosan (Austronesian) language of Taiwan, written in the Latin script under the Council of Indigenous Peoples' 2005 romanisation. Its three varieties (Tgdaya, Toda, Truku) differ phonologically, so a letter→IPA table would need to be variety-scoped. INPUT CONTRACT: Latin-script (official romanisation) Seediq/Truku text.
